news.t: Defiance Launches PLTZ: The First 2X Short ETF for Palantir Technologies Inc.

holdings.infoBox: PLTZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Short PLTR ETF (PLTZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to provide 2x inverse exposure to the daily share price movement of Palantir Technologies Inc. (NYSE: PLTR), less fees and expenses, through the use of swaps. PLTZ was launched on Jun 5, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
